mapper.sql: SELECT id, upstream_metric_id, downstream_metric_id, transformation_type, transformation_logic, dependency_strength, create_time FROM bi_metric_lineage
mapper.select: WHERE downstream_metric_id = #{metricId} ORDER BY dependency_strength DESC
WHERE upstream_metric_id = #{metricId} ORDER BY dependency_strength DESC

SELECT ml.id AS edge_id, ml.upstream_metric_id AS source_metric_id, ml.downstream_metric_id AS target_metric_id, ml.transformation_type, ml.transformation_logic, ml.dependency_strength, m1.metric_code AS source_code, m1.metric_name AS source_name, m2.metric_code AS target_code, m2.metric_name AS target_name FROM bi_metric_lineage ml INNER JOIN bi_metric_metadata m1 ON m1.id = ml.upstream_metric_id AND m1.del_flag = '0' INNER JOIN bi_metric_metadata m2 ON m2.id = ml.downstream_metric_id AND m2.del_flag = '0' WHERE ml.upstream_metric_id = #{metricId} OR ml.downstream_metric_id = #{metricId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO bi_metric_lineage
upstream_metric_id, downstream_metric_id, transformation_type, transformation_logic, dependency_strength,
#{upstreamMetricId}, #{downstreamMetricId}, #{transformationType}, #{transformationLogic}, #{dependencyStrength},

INSERT INTO bi_metric_lineage (upstream_metric_id, downstream_metric_id, transformation_type, transformation_logic, dependency_strength) VALUES
(#{item.upstreamMetricId}, #{item.downstreamMetricId}, #{item.transformationType}, #{item.transformationLogic}, #{item.dependencyStrength})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM bi_metric_lineage WHERE id IN
#{id}
DELETE FROM bi_metric_lineage WHERE upstream_metric_id = #{metricId} OR downstream_metric_id = #{metricId}
